texto: Never allow any level of success to steal your humility. You are not the first person to succeed on earth
autor: neither will you be the last one to do so. Please humble yourself and never treat others like they are inferior to you.
explicacao: Citação de neither will you be the last one to do so. Please humble yourself and never treat others like they are inferior to you. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Never allow any level of success to steal your humility. You are not the first person to succeed …” articula motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
